advancements.aortic.blood_harvest.title: A Taste so Divine...
advancements.aortic.use_hematology_table: Take a peek into the inner-workings of your body.
blood.aortic.cannot_use.combat: You are in combat right now!
blood.aortic.enderman.passive: Will take damage whilst touching water or when exposed to rain.
blood.aortic.enderman.trigger: When sneaking, saves a position to teleport back to. When not sneaking, teleports to said position over ~5s. If hit during this time, the timer will stop.
blood.aortic.pufferfish.trigger: Releases an invisible cloud of toxins, poisoning all nearby enemies with an armor-piercing sting.
blood.aortic.rabbit.trigger: Dashes forward with great speed in whichever direction currently being looked in.
death.attack.detonation.item: %1$s got caught in %2$s's radius who was wielding %3$s
death.attack.harvest.item: %1$s bled out at the hands of %2$s, wielding %3$s
death.attack.harvest.player: %1$s bled out at the hands of %2$s
death.attack.hematolic.item: %1$s's heart gave out whilst fighting %2$s who was wielding %3$s
death.attack.toxin.item: %1$s got stung by %2$s who was wielding %3$s
item.aortic.knife.refuse: You cannot splice your blood with this entity!
